title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Colombia RETIE electrical-installation and product controls, CREG storage and grid treatment, IEC-based project specifications, UN 38.3 transport, fire-safety review, and 60 Hz design expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与哥伦比亚RETIE电气安装及产品管理、CREG储能和并网处理、IEC项目技术规格、UN 38.3运输、消防安全审查及60Hz设计要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與哥倫比亞RETIE電氣安裝及產品管理、CREG儲能和併網處理、IEC項目技術規格、UN 38.3運輸、消防安全審查及60Hz設計要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, RETIE scope determination, CREG market ruling, grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, developers, EPC contractors, and owners should verify current Colombia RETIE, CREG, grid, fire, transport, customs, and municipal requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, contracting, energisation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、RETIE适用范围裁定、CREG市场裁定、并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、开发商、EPC承包商和业主在出货、签约、送电或调试前，应与合格专业人士核验现行哥伦比亚RETIE、CREG、电网、消防、运输、海关及市政要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、RETIE適用範圍裁定、CREG市場裁定、併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、開發商、EPC承包商和業主在出貨、簽約、送電或調試前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥倫比亞RETIE、CREG、電網、消防、運輸、海關及市政要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Colombia, do not assume a single whole-unit BESS approval. RETIE is mandatory where the electrical product or installation is in scope, CREG and grid rules matter for connected storage projects, UN 38.3 supports lithium-battery transport, and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence is normally project, lender, insurer, buyer, or engineering-specification driven unless incorporated into a Colombian requirement.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口哥伦比亚时，不应假定存在单一整机BESS批准。电气产品或安装落入适用范围时，RETIE属于强制要求；并网储能项目还需处理CREG及电网规则；UN 38.3支持锂电池运输；IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据通常由项目、融资方、保险方、买方或工程技术规格驱动，除非被纳入哥伦比亚要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口哥倫比亞時，不應假定存在單一整機BESS批准。電氣產品或安裝落入適用範圍時，RETIE屬於強制要求；併網儲能項目還需處理CREG及電網規則；UN 38.3支持鋰電池運輸；IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據通常由項目、融資方、保險方、買方或工程技術規格驅動，除非被納入哥倫比亞要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
